name: zrl-dev-site
description: Main personal website for zrl.dev with redirects from zrlo.dev and zrlopez.dev

scripts.deploy: npx wrangler pages project create zrl-dev-site --production-branch main --preview-branch '' || npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name zrl-dev-site
scripts.build: echo 'Static site - no build step required'
